title: Resolution No. 4 of 2024 Regarding the National Frequency Plan 2024
summary: Provides the national spectrum allocation framework for radiocommunications equipment and services, including IoT and short-range devices, and identifies requirements for spectrum users, importers, manufacturers, and users of radiocommunications equipment.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Approves Bahrain’s current national radio spectrum allocation plan.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Approves Bahrain’s current National Frequency Plan.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law, Type Approval Regulation, Short Range Devices Regulation
